care.summary: Sturdy tree-form ficus with large glossy oval leaves; thrives in bright indirect light.
care.light: Bright indirect light; tolerates moderate light, but avoid direct harsh sun
care.water: Water when top 2-3 cm of soil is dry; reduce in winter
care.fertilizer: Balanced liquid fertilizer monthly in spring/summer
care.toxicity: Toxic to pets if ingested (sap can also irritate skin)
common_issues: Dropping lower leaves from overwatering or drafts
Brown leaf edges from dry air
Loss of variegation in low light
tips: Wipe leaves regularly to keep them glossy and dust-free
Propagate via stem cuttings or air layering
Use a slightly snug pot for best growth
